calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-06-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Michelle Lerman and Dylan Lerman for Petitioner.

The Court inquired as to the time spent for this matter. Mr. Recht stated the fees are reasonable because his office had spent a considerable amount of time over four years, that there was difficulty marshalling assets, sorting out the father, mother and grandfather's trusts which included business accounts, ancillary real estate in the grandfather's estate, and that there were mistakes in the accounts. Mr. Recht further stated that there was coordination needed with 1) different attorneys for the trustees of the trusts, 2) ex-spouse regarding IRA issues, and 3) accountant. Ms. Lerman stated there would be a hardship on the firm if they did not get extraordinary fees with a loss of $60,000.00, and that she is happy this matter is resolved.

The Amended Petition for Settlement of Final Report on Waiver of Accounting, etc., was taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-24-2019 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Ownership Of Estate Property, Request For Nunc Pro Tunc Order, And For Order Authorizing And Directing The Transfer Of Estate Property
Off Calendar Jul-17-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dylan Recht for Erin Sills and Eli Sills (Petitioners).

The Court noted that all the parties really need is instruction to return certain money that was received by the trust. Mr. Recht stated that they want an order, that they want everything to be proper, that they want the order to relate back in time and that all of the Parties have consented. The Court stated that it will not issue a nunc pro tunc order and requested that Counsel provide a revised form of order. The Court grants the Petition to Determine Ownership of Estate Property, etc. as to the return of income received to the trust as of the date of the order (subject to receipt and review of the revised order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-26-2019 Continued To Jul-24-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on July 24, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-18-2018 Continued To Oct-16-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sara Kern appeared by telephone for Erin Sills and Eli Sills (Administrators).

Ms. Kern requested a continuance stating that they discovered one additional change that needs to be done to the inventory and appraisal, and that they are working on it. Ms. Kern also stated that they are waiting for reserved funds from two Trusts, that they would like to have the probate matter open until they receive those funds and asked if she has to file a petition for instructions. Status on close of estate is continued to October 16, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that she needs to file either a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report on status of administration.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-06-2017 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-24-2017 Continued To Sep-06-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Karolyn Poppin for Erin Sills and Eli Sills (Co-Administrators).

Ms. Poppin stated that they do not anticipate distribution from the Trust for another twelve months. The Court asks why not do a petition for preliminary distribution and stated that the petition will need to be amended. The Petition for Settlement of Final Report on Waiver of Account, etc. is continued to September 6, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
